svn diff

Hello,

I found this port because I was looking for projects that use syntect syntax highlight and bat works really great.

I'm working to get syntect highlight working on editors/xi-core via plugin using editors/xi-term frontend to test it.

I found that bat project have an good man page included (mdoc format).

Could you please update port so man page is included?

Thanks,

Nuno Teixeira
